ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., San Antonio, Los Angeles) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1979-80) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Date the regular season starts */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* Date the regular season ends */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Date the playoffs start */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* Date the playoffs end */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in that season (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "two_p" INTEGER /* Two-pointers made */,
  "two_pa" INTEGER /* Two-pointers attempted */,
  "two_p_percentage" REAL /* Two-pointer percentage */,
  "three_p" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "three_p_percentage" REAL /* Three-pointer percentage */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won in the season */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team in the season */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Final rank of the team in the season (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances in the season */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games won */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games lost */,
  "playoff_win_percentage" REAL /* Playoff win percentage */,
  "playoff_rank" TEXT /* Final rank of the team in the playoffs (e.g., Champion, Knocked Out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "playoff_participation" INTEGER /* Whether the team participated in the playoffs */,
  "finals_rank" TEXT /* Final rank of the team in the playoffs (e.g., Champion, Knocked Out) */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games won */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games lost */,
  "playoff_win_percentage" REAL /* Playoff win percentage */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "playoff_finals_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of times the team reached the finals */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "playoff_wins_by_round" TEXT /* JSON object storing wins by each playoff round (e.g., First Round, Conference Semifinals, Conference Finals, Finals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object storing user permissions (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is playing at home */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is playing away */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referees" TEXT /* JSON object storing the names of the referees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "two_p" INTEGER /* Two-pointers made */,
  "two_pa" INTEGER /* Two-pointers attempted */,
  "two_p_percentage" REAL /* Two-pointer percentage */,
  "three_p" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "three_p_percentage" REAL /* Three-pointer percentage */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_logs ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_teams" (
  "season_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach for the team in the season */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team mascot for the season */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
